\tzpentry{ID5675}{Modal Frequency Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5675 introduces Modal Frequency Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[
$_0}{8\pi}\int_V (|B_{\text{dipole}}|^2 + |B_{\text{gyro}}|^2)\,\mathrm{d}^3 r,\\ U_{\text{quantum}} &= \sum_n \hbar \omega_n\left(n_n + \tfrac{1}{2}\right)$
\]
